evaluators.name: Find and copy SWIFT code for Emirates NBD Bur Dubai retail branch
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered bank search to Emirates NBD retail branches in Bur Dubai (Dubai), opened a matching branch, and copied its primary SWIFT/BIC code.

evaluators.name: Save cheapest Dubai Islamic Bank branch under 20 AED for outgoing international transfers
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered fee comparison correctly for Dubai Islamic Bank, and saved the cheapest qualifying branch (<= 20 AED) as a favorite from the fee comparison.

evaluators.name: Find late-closing Dubai Marina corporate branch and copy routing code
evaluators.description: Checks that the user used the Branch Locator with Dubai Marina corporate filters and copied the routing code of a qualifying branch that closes at or after 8:00 PM on weekdays.

evaluators.name: Validate specific UAE IBAN and copy SWIFT of first Deira branch
evaluators.description: Checks that the user validated the given AE IBAN, resolved it to Emirates NBD, opened the first Deira branch for that bank, and copied its primary SWIFT/BIC code.

evaluators.name: Compare USD cut-off times in Deira and save branch with earlier cut-off
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered the Branch Locator for Deira USD branches, compared one Emirates NBD and one Mashreq branch, and saved the branch with the earlier USD international transfer cut-off time from the comparison.

evaluators.name: Compare two FAB Dubai branches supporting both EUR and USD
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered Branch Locator to First Abu Dhabi Bank branches in Dubai with EUR and USD, and added the first two matching branches (i.e., all qualifying ones) to the comparison set.

evaluators.name: Bookmark Dubai IBAN structure guide to reading list
evaluators.description: Checks that the user opened a guide about Dubai IBAN structure tagged 'IBAN basics' with reading time ≤ 10 minutes, and bookmarked it into the reading list.

evaluators.name: Submit incorrect-branch-code issue for Jumeirah branch with medium urgency and copy
evaluators.description: Checks that the user submitted an issue report for a Jumeirah branch offering both retail and corporate banking, with issue type 'incorrect_branch_code', medium urgency, and a copy requested.
